untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for DBW (Double Bottom W) requires visual/structural chart pattern detection not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal specifically requires identifying: (1) double bottom W formation structure, (2) distinguishing trend continuation vs reversal breakouts, (3) context-dependent directional bias based on market regime and breakout type. These require pattern-matching logic beyond OHLCV indicators. Used Donchian breakout as proxy for breakout detection, but true DBW pattern identification is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Signal uses chart pattern recognition (DBW formation) which cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. Approximated with Donchian channel breakouts as a mechanical proxy for support/resistance breakouts. Stop loss set to 5% as reasonable default given author silence on specific placement. Bull market bias (78% success rate upward vs lower downward) suggests preferring long entries on upward breakouts and short entries only on confirmed downward reversals, but this context-dependent logic cannot be encoded in the required rule structure without pattern detection.
